languages.original_text: {n}Without Nuncius, Eogunn cuts a rather strange and lonely figure. His eyes are sorrowful, but the familiar placid smile has been restored.{/n} "In a lifetime, we endure many losses and privations, but isn't it curious how some of them have the tendency to linger? Everyone carries phantoms of the past within themselves, but not everyone is able to keep those phantoms from consuming them whole. I am relieved that I have at last managed to make peace with mine."

languages.text:
{n}Эоганн без Нунциуса смотрится непривычно и одиноко. Его взгляд печален, но знакомая умиротворенная улыбка вновь на месте.{/n} "За жизнь мы претерпеваем множество потерь и лишений, но разве не любопытно как некоторые из них имеют свойство задерживаться? Каждый носит в себе фантомов былого, но не всякий способен не дать им поглотить себя полностью. Я рад, что мне наконец-то {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}
удалось примириться{/d} со своими".

{n}Without Nuncius, Eogunn cuts a rather strange and lonely figure. His eyes are sorrowful, but the familiar placid smile has been restored.{/n} "In a lifetime, we endure many losses and privations, but isn't it curious how some of them have the tendency to linger? Everyone carries phantoms of the past within themselves, but not everyone is able to keep those phantoms from consuming them whole. I am relieved that I have at last {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}managed to make peace{/d} with mine."

languages.text: {n}Sin Nuncius, Eogunn muestra una apariencia extraña y solitaria. Sus ojos están apenados, pero ha recuperado su sonrisa plácida de siempre.{/n} «A lo largo de la vida, soportamos muchas pérdidas y sacrificios, pero ¿no es curioso cómo algunos se quedan con nosotros? Todo el mundo lleva consigo fantasmas del pasado, pero algunos no pueden evitar que esos fantasmas los devoren por completo. Me alegra {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}haber aceptado los míos{/d} tal y como son, al menos».
languages.original_text: {n}Without Nuncius, Eogunn cuts a rather strange and lonely figure. His eyes are sorrowful, but the familiar placid smile has been restored.{/n} "In a lifetime, we endure many losses and privations, but isn't it curious how some of them have the tendency to linger? Everyone carries phantoms of the past within themselves, but not everyone is able to keep those phantoms from consuming them whole. I am relieved that I have at last {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}managed to make peace{/d} with mine."

traits.locale_text: {n}Sin Nuncius, Eogunn muestra una apariencia extraña y solitaria. Sus ojos están apenados, pero ha recuperado su sonrisa plácida de siempre.{/n} «A lo largo de la vida, soportamos muchas pérdidas y sacrificios, pero ¿no es curioso cómo algunos se quedan con nosotros? Todo el mundo lleva consigo fantasmas del pasado, pero algunos no pueden evitar que esos fantasmas los devoren por completo. Me alegra {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}haber aceptado los míos{/d} tal y como son, al menos».

languages.text: {n}没有了努恩修斯的陪伴，伊奥贡看起来格外孤独而怪异。他的眼中带着忧伤，但脸上已恢复那种熟悉的平静微笑。{/n}“人的一生之中，要经历许多失去和磨难，但有趣的是，有些东西偏偏挥之不去。每个人心中都藏着过去的幽灵，但并非人人都能阻止这些幽灵将自己吞噬。我很欣慰，我终于能与自己的幽灵达成{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}和解了{/d}。”
languages.original_text: {n}Without Nuncius, Eogunn cuts a rather strange and lonely figure. His eyes are sorrowful, but the familiar placid smile has been restored.{/n} "In a lifetime, we endure many losses and privations, but isn't it curious how some of them have the tendency to linger? Everyone carries phantoms of the past within themselves, but not everyone is able to keep those phantoms from consuming them whole. I am relieved that I have at last {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}managed to make peace{/d} with mine."

traits.locale_text: {n}没有了努恩修斯的陪伴，伊奥贡看起来格外孤独而怪异。他的眼中带着忧伤，但脸上已恢复那种熟悉的平静微笑。{/n}“人的一生之中，要经历许多失去和磨难，但有趣的是，有些东西偏偏挥之不去。每个人心中都藏着过去的幽灵，但并非人人都能阻止这些幽灵将自己吞噬。我很欣慰，我终于能与自己的幽灵达成{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}和解了{/d}。”

languages.text: {n}Sans Nuncius, Eogunn paraît aussi étrange que solitaire. Son regard est soucieux, mais il a retrouvé le sourire si calme qui le caractérise.{/n} « Nous subissons tous tant de pertes et de privations au cours de notre vie, mais ne trouvez-vous pas curieux comme certaines ont la fâcheuse manie de ne pas nous lâcher ? Nous sommes tous prisonniers des fantômes de notre passé, mais nous n'avons pas tous la force de les empêcher de nous dévorer. Pour ma part, j'ai au moins {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}réussi à faire la paix{/d} avec eux, et c'est un soulagement. »
languages.original_text: {n}Without Nuncius, Eogunn cuts a rather strange and lonely figure. His eyes are sorrowful, but the familiar placid smile has been restored.{/n} "In a lifetime, we endure many losses and privations, but isn't it curious how some of them have the tendency to linger? Everyone carries phantoms of the past within themselves, but not everyone is able to keep those phantoms from consuming them whole. I am relieved that I have at last {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}managed to make peace{/d} with mine."

Son regard est soucieux, mais il a retrouvé le sourire si calme qui le caractérise.{/n} « Nous subissons tous tant de pertes et de privations au cours de notre vie, mais ne trouvez-vous pas curieux comme certaines ont la fâcheuse manie de ne pas nous lâcher ? Nous sommes tous prisonniers des fantômes de notre passé, mais nous n'avons pas tous la force de les empêcher de nous dévorer. Pour ma part, j'ai au moins {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}réussi à faire la paix{/d} avec eux, et c'est un soulagement. »

languages.text: {n}Ohne Nuncius ist Eogunn eine recht seltsame und einsame Erscheinung. Seine Augen sind voller Sorge, aber das vertraute Lächeln ist wieder da.{/n} "Wir erdulden im Laufe eines Lebens viele Verluste und Entbehrungen, aber ist es nicht faszinierend, wie einige zum Bleiben neigen? Jeder hat seine eigenen Geister der Vergangenheit im Gepäck, aber nicht jeder kann verhindern, von diesen Geistern verzehrt zu werden. Ich bin erleichtert, dass ich mit meinen Geistern endlich {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}Frieden schließen konnte{/d}."
languages.original_text: {n}Without Nuncius, Eogunn cuts a rather strange and lonely figure. His eyes are sorrowful, but the familiar placid smile has been restored.{/n} "In a lifetime, we endure many losses and privations, but isn't it curious how some of them have the tendency to linger? Everyone carries phantoms of the past within themselves, but not everyone is able to keep those phantoms from consuming them whole. I am relieved that I have at last {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}managed to make peace{/d} with mine."

Seine Augen sind voller Sorge, aber das vertraute Lächeln ist wieder da.{/n} "Wir erdulden im Laufe eines Lebens viele Verluste und Entbehrungen, aber ist es nicht faszinierend, wie einige zum Bleiben neigen? Jeder hat seine eigenen Geister der Vergangenheit im Gepäck, aber nicht jeder kann verhindern, von diesen Geistern verzehrt zu werden. Ich bin erleichtert, dass ich mit meinen Geistern endlich {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}Frieden schließen konnte{/d}."

languages.text: {n}ヌンシウスのいないエオグンは、かなり奇妙で寂しい姿をしている。彼の目は悲しげだが、いつもの穏やかな微笑みは戻っている。{/n}「人は一生のうちに多くの喪失や苦難に耐えるものだが、そのうちのいくつかが長く残るのは不思議なことではないだろうか。誰もが自分の中に過去の幻影を抱いているが、その幻影に飲み込まれずにいられる人ばかりではない。私は、ようやく自分自身と和解することができてほっとしている」。
languages.original_text: {n}Without Nuncius, Eogunn cuts a rather strange and lonely figure. His eyes are sorrowful, but the familiar placid smile has been restored.{/n} "In a lifetime, we endure many losses and privations, but isn't it curious how some of them have the tendency to linger? Everyone carries phantoms of the past within themselves, but not everyone is able to keep those phantoms from consuming them whole. I am relieved that I have at last managed to make peace with mine."

languages.text: {n}Nuncius olmadan Eogunn, oldukça tuhaf ve yalnız bir figür çiziyor. Gözleri kederli ama o tanıdık uysal gülümsemesi geri dönmüş.{/n} "Bir ömür boyunca birçok kayba ve yoksunluğa katlanırız ama bazılarının oyalanmaya meyilli olması ne ilginçtir, öyle değil mi? Herkes kendi içinde geçmişin hayaletlerini taşır ama herkes o hayaletlerin kendisini bütünüyle tüketmesine engel olamaz. Nihayet {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}benimkilerle barışabildiğim{/d} için rahatlamış hissediyorum."
